samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="IDLE">Idle state.</state>
        <state name="PULSE_START">Start of pulse state.</state>
        <state name="PULSE_MID">Middle of pulse state.</state>
        <state name="PULSE_END">End of pulse state.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="state" width="2">State register.</register>
        <wire id="next_state">Next state signal.</wire>
        <assign>next_state = (state == IDLE && data_in == 1'b1) ? PULSE_START : 
                         (state == PULSE_START && data_in == 1'b0) ? PULSE_MID : 
                         (state == PULSE_MID && data_in == 1'b1) ? PULSE_END : 
                         (state == PULSE_END && data_in == 1'b0) ? IDLE : state;</assign>
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= IDLE;
                data_out <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                state <= next_state;
                case(state)
                    IDLE: data_out <= 1'b0;
                    PULSE_START: data_out <= 1'b0;
                    PULSE_MID: data_out <= 1'b0;
                    PULSE_END: data_out <= 1'b1;
                endcase
            end
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Sequential logic for pulse detection and output generation.</implementation>
</module>
```
